name: XEROX Work Centre 7855
description: High-performance multifunction color printer (MFP) designed for medium to large office environments. **Printer Specifications:** - **Print Technology:** Laser (Color) - **Max Print Resolution:** 1200 x 2400 dpi - **Print Speed:** - Up to 55 pages per minute (ppm) for black and white. - Up to 55 ppm for color. **Copying:** - **Copy Speed:** - 55 ppm (black and white) - 55 ppm (color) - **First-Copy-Out Time:** - As fast as 5.1 seconds for black and white. - As fast as 7.2 seconds for color. **Scanning:** - **Scan Resolution:** Up to 600 x 600 dpi - **Scan Speed:** Up to 133 images per minute (ipm) - **Duplex Automatic Document Feeder (DADF):** 130 sheets capacity ### **Fax:** - **Fax Transmission Speed:** Up to 33.6 kbps ### **Paper Handling:** - **Max Paper Size:** 12.6 x 19 inches - **Paper Input Capacity:** - Standard: 1,140 sheets - Maximum: 5,140 sheets - **Output Capacity:** 500 sheets ### **Memory & Storage:** - **Memory:** 2 GB - **Hard Drive:** 160 GB HDD ### **Connectivity:** - **Standard Interfaces:** - 10/100/1000Base-T Ethernet - USB 2.0 - **Optional Interfaces:** Wi-Fi connectivity ### **Additional Features:** - **Finishing Options:** Stapling, hole punching, booklet creation - **Duplex Printing:** Automatic (standard) ### **Dimensions:** - **Dimensions (W x D x H):** 41 x 28.5 x 47.7 inches (1041 x 724 x 1212 mm) - **Weight:** Approx. 252.6 lbs (114.6 kg) The Xerox WC7855 is well-suited for high-volume environments, offering a wide range of finishing options, fast performance, and excellent print quality for both black-and-white and color prints.
